textByHash.021d15a8db768cc9726a51727789cbab12c9d2c1: I suggest that I invest the ability to communicate with the monkeys in an authentic monkey amulet.
textByHash.05ca2f0900ce2092a41d3dd6279a889fb4256a52: There will be two aspects to your transformation. We must first arrange it so that you are able to understand and communicate with the monkeys.
textByHash.09b5bf52dcfa838a16e42d1ee4f081e825a41575: Correct. I assume Lumdo told you this?
textByHash.09c410a5627d6797ce013811457ee9ced740f437: For the spells to take full effect, they will have to be in some way related to the monkeys.
textByHash.0a8c5311861b54360cf394d242202b216e17e43f: There ought to be something in the village. I cannot be sure, as I have not spent much time there.
textByHash.0d0f6fe2902d4cf26dfd76c12a5153aa528c9dd7: Slow, as ever. Can't you tell?
textByHash.0fc7339c3dfa4a72114bda66129a23b24bcb08a5: I think you misunderstand, human. Do you know why you were sent here?
textByHash.16cf63b7c7c5816af1c7f1ca92e3ea52162d48d9: , are you okay? We detected a very powerful presence in the caverns and decided to pull you out, I couldn't get a lock on Nieve, is she alright?
textByHash.19ec706cbb510ed3bb0220afa911bcc4786e4ade: Then bring me different monkey remains and another talisman.
textByHash.207474d684096a89216b14669d0089b63603efc0: Indeed. However, King Narnode Shareen is still in contact with Garkor! You were sent here because Garkor specifically asked Narnode for you!
textByHash.21ab61e4ce6baf2f177fd0f8669a3103fc5a5975: So that the effects of my spells are not permanent, I will invest their power into magical items which you must find. You can then use them at your will.
textByHash.24d9d8989888560e0f065b298fd266278e33160d: He did!? He was explicitly ordered to guard the gliders! How did this happen? Who is guarding the gliders now?
textByHash.26edd2efa0ddc021ca1ce96684361adf68bbf41d: We still need an authentic magical monkey talisman.
textByHash.278d58a8213782e4690d3a6c8b748c73cfee63f4: A human... here? What business have you on Ape Atoll?
textByHash.2b5b6fe5216b2ebde1d47af94cfcdee4bd50e296: Finally. He wants me to turn you into a monkey.
textByHash.2b7babdbbfc39cf6e9c1e61857ae9426eaf7a617: Furthermore, you will not be able to attack whilst using this, so be careful. Perhaps when I refine my spells I could look into making this possible.
textByHash.2fc90ea29d8b97a218d4d00ea14f5fb670279494: We need a gold bar, a monkey amulet mould and something to do monkey speech.
textByHash.3039b508e01c8650e15b0f6e801263900cb3ce2d: We have considered this, but every entrance seems to be excessively guarded.
textByHash.3cf7cccc32dde272aab200edd0616a594fe673bb: The rumours are correct. We were indeed blown off course. Fortunately, we managed to find a small island to steer our gliders towards, else we surely would have drowned.
textByHash.414c53c35165b5a444468c9273fa41266a019052: Well done, human. Bear with me now.
textByHash.428d4343d4e7c34d2b06c7a8887f546e21c710fe: I don't know. I'm sure you'll think of something.
textByHash.43a5112fa7b7036871443ca437e655c9ea9c174a: Careless human. No matter - bring me the same materials again and I will prepare for you another one.
textByHash.4942826e097b147ebdc43048ea367ddec7c93cd7: Myself, the Sergeant, Bunkwicket and Waymottin here. Karam, our assassin, probably managed to escape - he usually does.
textByHash.4b33b2288b28e97a0ebe671c380e70d5c5ddc140: I'll leave that to your better judgement... However, bear in mind the type of remain might affect the type of monkey you become...
textByHash.512a3237c9620f2017424f18f2adeda9329d4c87: Is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.550a8f4ab8802968fb75dff36d4965ce6a427a6d: We were overwhelmed in numbers. Some of us managed to escape, but the rest were taken captive.
textByHash.5685eba93b729fc0dd67b98ee3f2000ddc7322e0: They ought to be for sale in the village, but be careful: you probably will not be able to walk straight in and buy one.
textByHash.5e49fc699be25adfb0788dbafdb1789fa98eb7b1: Monkeys. Lots of monkeys. They are unlike any other type of monkey we've come across. A far cry from the usual wild variety, these were armed with high quality weaponry and uncanny tactical ability.
textByHash.5e5654c2cba5a3e9b88a7e680f027bdbe5c5dccf: We still need the gold bar.
textByHash.622360790224e60a9900b047b0ef0a0e56182a68: We need some kind of monkey remains as well as an authentic magical monkey talisman.
textByHash.6c1d298a95552d5fbe7dd40d766eee075d320e74: I am not sure. You look wealthy enough to know the answer to that question anyway.
textByHash.6caf420a1eafdba7133218638482bb541b386de3: We split up into several small groups to search the island for potential gnome glider launch sites. Whilst we knew the island to be inhabited, we did not expect its occupants to be quite so ... militant.
textByHash.782f58e82a3d1d26c2cba46a7839b5841ab1fb28: The range at which I will be able to sustain it is limited. I cannot ensure it will be effective off the atoll.
textByHash.7e2fcbf6370260e26685b8558b7949db82455354: Your story first, human. What possessed you to travel to this forsaken island?
textByHash.7e5909d1efe28350d0b7336ec4a6201e09fa3344: Well you've found us - what's left of us, that is.
textByHash.85e5abac024c594c0336f5be777187e7a69a61ca: We still need the gold bar and something to do with monkey speech.
textByHash.8a7227f33c6e55fc2ecc09132e869301686bbb9b: Aha. He wants me to turn you into a monkey.
textByHash.94b50efd75e4f3c6999da2f6e789b498c88d5987: You already have one of those.
textByHash.95f36a36b018cf616ec371434d0b25c55e22fd02: We are attempting to tunnel to this northern cavern and then move upwards from there.
textByHash.989c70c7cf36ab7a2478c3e5c87cf03761310b2c: What type of talisman are you after then?
textByHash.9cba7a4b90a3cba640480bb41d0a1ba6b756a2b5: You must then smith the gold using the monkey amulet mould. However, unless you do this in a place of religious significance to the monkeys, the spirits contained within will likely depart.
textByHash.9d38c808c77de298d6e0e0fa87d76cdd6a250928: Somewhere in the village. It ought to be obvious. Now give me a moment.
textByHash.9eff0bcfa948e437b7e79f9b2d8a581d3688ae8e: We must also transform your body so that you may pass amongst them unnoticed.
textByHash.a97403664431701ee5d2169e03f954bbde9d51da: Now listen closely, human. I will cast a spell to enchant this gold bar with the power contained in these monkey dentures.
textByHash.aae2d58016b77bede8e3c9c84a84b19c7fd0279f: We still need some kind of monkey remains.
textByHash.b340a3b03f49d84431cd5e756776b01c5c26db57: Very well. Bring me the required materials again and I will prepare for you another one.
textByHash.bb93255f82f9d63e2abc1597cd25d7b019996bd8: Before you arrived on this island, that information would have endangered both yourself and the mission.
textByHash.bbd8763dffc500d2743bab178e1e0b932dd8990a: I am afraid I have not been able to fully invest my powers in that talisman. You may use it, but it will continue to draw its energy directly from me.
textByHash.bed2bc635fe004770661a6ddb51c9c46f893bdae: Lumo, Bunkdo and Carado were captured, as I said. We believe they are being held in the jail. We are working on a way to release them. I have sensed there lies a cavern to the north.
textByHash.c7e8ee9425a45edae59356c2537811c402b5b3fd: Good day. What can I help you with?
textByHash.cd3e1e9391bf3f5571d4a65b53ff23367624976e: I am Zooknock, the 10th squad mage. These are Bunkwicket and Waymottin, two of our finest sappers. I assume you will want to know how we got here?
textByHash.d4c0a6404a180d44e35e073cd55ab039f153735e: Similarly, the transformation spell should be stored in a monkey talisman of some kind.
textByHash.d5bd4019a3395de770db9e1ec981cbb4d2ec4e3d: Garkor had long decided that we need a monkey insider. I have the necessary magic to perform the shapeshifting spell, but we needed a human to transform.
textByHash.d8ac168ce80182e05c9bb4c89adccf8075812652: It has been tried in the past, but the results were far from ... satisfactory. Although we, like you, are related to the monkeys, the link is too weak for a successful transformation. That is why we need you.
textByHash.d93066cb11f119a648dd20bb7047d98ae35f5556: Bear with me human: I must now cast an extremely powerful spell. It is not often we are successful in investing shapeshifting powers within objects.
textByHash.e195006580bdc69293e551dd58e5fd16d2815050: Flight Commander Waydar you said? For some reason that name is familiar...
textByHash.e4193d93b6f88a1eef3e0904a102f6c2a75e7065: Not a problem, Awowogei has given us access to all the resources we need to create new talismans.
textByHash.ed40b730ffe82897e1031c1a507ab593b079b30c: The so called Crash Island. We left there one of our number, Lumdo, to guard our gliders until our return.
textByHash.ef2a4f025b3fb5bbb16b8c0a58f82db577d70efd: You should report back to the king, I can teleport you to the Grand Tree if you would like?
